errors.validation: Please check the form for errors.
errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

queue.title: Tickets
queue.countMatching: {count, plural, =0 {No tickets} =1 {# ticket} other {# tickets}} matching "{query}"
queue.search: Search by ticket #, subject, or customer email
queue.empty: No tickets yet. They'll appear here as customers submit them.

submit.title: Submit a ticket
submit.subtitle: Tell us what's wrong and a coordinator will route it to a technician.

fields.subject: Subject
fields.subjectAgentPlaceholder: Short summary as the customer described it
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened? What did you expect to happen? Anything you've tried?
fields.descriptionAgentPlaceholder: What did the customer report? Include any context they gave.

submit.captchaSkipped: Cloudflare Turnstile is not configured — captcha is skipped in dev.
submit.chooseCategoryPriority: Please choose a category and priority.

errors.tooManyByIp: Too many submissions from your network. Try again in an hour.
errors.tooManyByEmail: Too many submissions from this email today. Try again tomorrow.
errors.captchaFailed: Captcha verification failed. Please refresh the page and try again.

submitSuccess.title: Ticket submitted
submitSuccess.subtitle: We've received your ticket. A coordinator will route it to a technician shortly.
submitSuccess.trackingHelp: Save this number — you'll need it to ask about the ticket. We've also emailed you a confirmation.

createOnBehalf.title: Create ticket on behalf
createOnBehalf.subtitle: Use this when a customer reports an issue by phone or in person. The customer will receive the standard confirmation email.

resolveModal.title: Resolve ticket
resolveModal.description: Describe what fixed the issue. The note is stored on the ticket and sent to the customer with their CSAT request.
resolveModal.minLengthError: Resolution note must be at least 10 characters.

escalateModal.escalateDescription: Tell IT leadership why this needs to come up the chain. The reason is stored on the ticket.
escalateModal.deescalateDescription: Clear the escalation flag once the situation is back under control.
escalateModal.minLengthError: Reason must be at least 10 characters.

reply.placeholder: Write a reply to the customer…

csat.satisfiedBody: Thanks for confirming — we've closed the ticket. If anything comes back, just open a new one and we'll pick it up.
csat.unsatisfiedBody: We've reopened the ticket and a technician will follow up. Watch your inbox for the next update.
csat.invalidBody: The CSAT link in your email looks expired or invalid. If you still need to give feedback, reply to the resolution email and we'll capture it manually.
csat.alreadyResponded: We already had your answer on file — nothing else changed.

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Use your Axiom360 staff credentials.
login.genericError: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.

landing.subtitle: Pick something from the sidebar to get started.

stubs.comingSoon: Coming soon — lands in a later milestone.

shared.footerLine2: This is an automated message. Reply to this email to add to your ticket.

ticketCreated.title: We've received your ticket
ticketCreated.body: Thanks for reaching out. Your ticket {ticketNumber} — “{subject}” — has been received and a coordinator will assign it to a technician shortly.
ticketCreated.replyHint: You'll hear from us as soon as it's assigned. To add details or a screenshot, just reply to this email.
ticketCreated.fallback: If the link above doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
ticketCreated.subject: [{ticketNumber}] We've received your ticket: {subject}

ticketAssigned.preview: Your ticket {ticketNumber} is now being worked on
ticketAssigned.title: Your ticket is now being worked on
ticketAssigned.body: Good news — {technicianName} has picked up your ticket {ticketNumber} and is looking into “{subject}”.
ticketAssigned.footer: You'll get an update as soon as they have something to share. You can also reply to this email at any time to add details.
ticketAssigned.subject: [{ticketNumber}] Your ticket has been assigned: {subject}

ticketReply.title: {agentName} replied to your ticket
ticketReply.intro: We've sent you an update on “{subject}”:
ticketReply.footer: You can reply to this email to keep the conversation going, or open the ticket in your browser.
ticketReply.trailerLine: Reply to this email or click the link above to respond. Mention ticket {ticketNumber} if your mail client doesn't keep the thread.
ticketReply.subject: [{ticketNumber}] Re: {subject}

ticketResolved.title: Your ticket has been resolved
ticketResolved.body: {agentName} has resolved your ticket {ticketNumber} — “{subject}”. Here's what they did:
ticketResolved.feedbackPrompt: Did this fix the issue? Your feedback closes the loop. If we don't hear back within 24 hours, the ticket will close automatically.
ticketResolved.viewLine: You can also <link>view the ticket</link> or reply to this email if you need to add more details.
ticketResolved.subject: [{ticketNumber}] Resolved — was this fixed? {subject}

ticketClosed.title: Your ticket is closed
ticketClosed.bodyCsat: Thanks for confirming — ticket {ticketNumber} “{subject}” is now closed.
ticketClosed.bodyAuto: We hadn't heard back on ticket {ticketNumber} “{subject}”, so we've closed it for you. If the issue comes back, just open a new ticket and we'll pick it up.
ticketClosed.newTicketPrompt: Need help with something else? Open a fresh ticket any time.
ticketClosed.subject: [{ticketNumber}] Ticket closed: {subject}

ticketReopened.title: Your ticket has been reopened
ticketReopened.bodyCsat: Sorry our last fix didn't do it. Ticket {ticketNumber} “{subject}” is reopened and we're back on it. A technician will follow up shortly.
ticketReopened.bodyAgent: Ticket {ticketNumber} “{subject}” has been reopened by our team and assigned for follow-up.
ticketReopened.footer: If there's any extra detail that would help us, just reply to this email and we'll add it to the ticket.
ticketReopened.subject: [{ticketNumber}] Ticket reopened: {subject}

escalationAlert.title: A ticket has been escalated
escalationAlert.guidance: The ticket is still assigned to {technicianName}. Please review and either take it over, advise, or de-escalate when ready.
escalationAlert.subject: [{ticketNumber}] Ticket escalated: {subject}
